'''Ngyn Reeos''' was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']]. He tried to arrest [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] when he escaped from the [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] onboard the [[Talisman (starship)|''Talisman'']]. With the help of [[Jalus Nebl]], Solo managed to escape.<ref name="TCSWE" />
